top_signals.title: ECB Views Splinter on Next Rate Move as Inflation Sinks With Oil
top_signals.summary: Just three weeks after the European Central Bank unanimously raised interest rates in response to the Iran war, there’s no consensus on what to do next.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Worries Less Fed Talk Will Spur Market Volatility
top_signals.summary: It’s only been a few weeks since Kevin Warsh took the helm of the Federal Reserve, but analysts are already concerned that one of his key promises — a quieter central bank — will lead to more volatility in the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Bank to phase out China lending
top_signals.summary: Decision from global development institution follows years of pressure from the Trump administration
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: USMCA Was a Great Success Story For North America Says Timmons
top_signals.summary: The US won’t renew its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a decision that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North America. Jay Timmons, president and CEO of the National Association of Manufacturers joined Balance of Power and said the US trade deal with Canada and Mexico was a "great success story." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading
top_signals.summary: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 built using Arbitrum's tech stack, went live on public mainnet, with partners including Uniswap from day one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
